dw_ash_acolyte.bbcode:
你每施放一张指令牌
本随从 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf][color=#55c7b8]+1[/color]/+0[/font] 每回合最多 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 次

dw_cinder_moth.bbcode: [color=#df7467][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]亡语[/font][/color]:相邻敌方随从受到 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]3[/font] 点[color=#df7467][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]薪炎伤害[/font][/color]

dw_pyre_channeler.bbcode: 你每施放一张指令牌后,相邻敌方随从受到 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font] 点[color=#df7467][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]薪炎伤害[/font][/color]

dw_flame_caster.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]战吼[/font][/color](以自身为锚点,[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]射程[/font][/color][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font]):对一个随从造成 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 点[color=#df7467][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]薪炎伤害[/font][/color]

dw_ember_seer.bbcode:
你每施放一张指令牌
本随从 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf][color=#55c7b8]+1/+1[/color][/font] 每回合最多 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 次

dw_flare_dancer.bbcode:
[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]突袭[/font][/color]。
[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]战吼[/font][/color]:[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]蓄能[/font][/color] [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font](你的下一张[color=#df7467][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]薪炎伤害[/font][/color]指令 [color=#55c7b8][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+2[/font][/color])。

dw_pyroclast.bbcode: 由本随从[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]引导[/font][/color]的[color=#df7467][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]薪炎[/font][/color]指令伤害 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+2[/font]

dw_ash_phoenix.bbcode:
[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]亡语[/font][/color]:在你的底线行召唤一只 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font]/[font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 烬火雏凤,并将一张随机指令牌从你的墓地移回手牌。
[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]免疫薪炎[/font][/color]

dw_first_ritualist.bbcode: 你每回合施放的第一张[color=#df7467][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]薪炎伤害[/font][/color]指令可以再次施放一次,由你另选目标(没有敌方目标则空放/取消)

dw_spark.bbcode:
对一个随从造成 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font] 点[color=#df7467][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]薪炎伤害[/font][/color],抽 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font] 张牌。
需友方随从引导(施法距离 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font])。

dw_flame_lash.bbcode: 可选择敌方随从→造成 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]3[/font] 点[color=#df7467][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]薪炎伤害[/font][/color]；或选友方随从→消灭它，将其攻/血全额转移给另一个友方随从。需友方随从引导(施法距离 2)。

dw_immolate.bbcode: 献祭一个友方随从,抽 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 张牌

dw_vesper_blast.bbcode:
对一个格子及其相邻格的所有随从造成 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 点[color=#df7467][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]薪炎伤害[/font][/color](含友方)。
需友方随从[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]引导[/font][/color](施法距离 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]3[/font])。

dw_fire_curtain.bbcode:
选择一行:该行所有敌方随从受到 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 点[color=#df7467][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]薪炎伤害[/font][/color]。
需友方随从[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]引导[/font][/color](施法距离 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]3[/font])。

dw_column_inferno.bbcode:
对所有敌方随从造成 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]3[/font] 点[color=#df7467][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]薪炎灼蚀伤害[/font][/color](无视[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]坚守[/font][/color])。
需友方随从[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]引导[/font][/color]。

dw_phoenix_chick.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]成长[/font][/color]: [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]4[/font] 个回合后化为灰烬凤凰，每次受到薪炎伤害加快 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font] 回合，[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]免疫薪炎伤害[/font][/color]。

dw_flame_adept.bbcode: 由本随从引导的[color=#df7467][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]薪炎[/font][/color]指令[font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf][color=#df7467]法术加深 1[/color][/font](伤害 +1)

dw_scorch_zealot.bbcode: [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf][color=#e0b24a]归魂[/color][/font]:你的回合内友方随从死亡时,获得 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font] 点本回合辉尘(每回合最多 2 次)

dw_choir_acolyte.bbcode:
你每施放一张指令牌
本随从 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+0/[color=#55c7b8]+1[/color][/font] 每回合最多 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 次

dw_ashen_courier.bbcode: [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf][color=#e0b24a]战吼[/color][/font]:将 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font] 张随机指令牌从你的墓地移回手牌

dw_conflagrate.bbcode:
造成 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]5[/font] 次 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font] 点[color=#df7467][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]薪炎伤害[/font][/color],随机分配到敌方随从(每点[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]加深[/font][/color]/[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]蓄能[/font][/color] [color=#55c7b8][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+1[/font][/color] 发)。
需友方随从[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]引导[/font][/color]。

dw_searing_brand.bbcode: 对一个随从随机造成 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 或 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]3[/font] 点[color=#df7467][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]薪炎灼蚀[/font][/color]伤害(无视坚守)。需友方随从引导(施法距离 2)。

dw_vesper_cantor.bbcode: 由本随从[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]引导[/font][/color]的[color=#df7467][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]薪炎伤害[/font][/color]指令费用 [color=#55c7b8][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]-1[/font][/color](下限 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font] 费)

dw_rekindle.bbcode: 将 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 张随机指令牌从你的墓地移回手牌

dw_flare_summoner.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]战吼[/font][/color]:在你的底线行召唤一只 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font]/[font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 烬火雏凤

dw_cinder_storm.bbcode:
选择一列:该列所有敌方随从受到 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 点[color=#df7467][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]薪炎灼蚀伤害[/font][/color]。
需友方随从[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]引导[/font][/color](施法距离 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]3[/font])。

dw_inferno_behemoth.bbcode: 每施放一张 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]4[/font] 费以上指令牌，对所有敌方随从造成 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font] 点[color=#df7467][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]薪炎伤害[/font][/color]

dw_dusk_matriarch.bbcode:
你每施放一张指令牌后
将 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font] 张随机指令牌从你的墓地移回手牌,且本随从 [color=#55c7b8][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+1/+1[/font][/color]。
永焰不熄。

dw_molten_sword_priest.bbcode:
[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]战吼[/font][/color]:你可以献祭手牌中 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 张指令牌；
若如此做,装备[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]熔岩巨剑[/font][/color]([color=#55c7b8][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+3[/font][/color] 攻,[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]射程[/font][/color] [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font],[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]贯穿[/font][/color])

dw_smoke_bomb.bbcode: 目标格及相邻十字成为烟幕区，区内随从无法攻击且不反击，走出即解除，持续到你的下回合。需友方随从引导(施法距离 3)。

dw_ash_bind.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]定身[/font][/color] 一个随从直到你的下回合(不能移动,可攻击)。需友方随从引导(施法距离 3)。

dw_oath_counter.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]暗牌[/font][/color]:下次敌方指令牌选中你的随从时,该指令无效,改为对施放者一方随机随从造成 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]3[/font] 点[color=#df7467][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]薪炎伤害[/font][/color]

dw_ember_trap.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]暗牌[/font][/color]：在一个无人格子埋设陷阱。随从进入即受 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]3 点[color=#df7467]薪炎灼蚀[/color][/font]；现形后火焰持续 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 回合。(不可设在敌方底线)

iv_oathguard.bbcode:
[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]嘲讽[/font][/color]、[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]坚守[/font][/color]
[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]战吼[/font][/color]：相邻友方随从 [color=#55c7b8][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]
+0/+1[/font][/color]。

iv_fortress_lord.bbcode:
[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]嘲讽[/font][/color]、[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]坚守[/font][/color]、[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]驻防[/font][/color]
[u][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]守在底线，便是一座城[/font][/u]

iv_hold_the_line.bbcode: 你底线行的所有友方随从 [color=#55c7b8][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+1/+1[/font][/color]

iv_overline_execution.bbcode: 对你半场内的一个敌方随从造成 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]4[/font] 点伤害

iv_oath_banner.bbcode: 你底线行的所有友方随从 [color=#55c7b8][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+0/+2[/font][/color]

iv_aegis_sergeant.bbcode:
[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]持盾[/font][/color]
[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]战吼[/font][/color]:一个友方随从获得[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]持盾[/font][/color]。

iv_overline_judge.bbcode:
[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]坚守[/font][/color]
[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]战吼[/font][/color]:对你半场内的一个敌方随从造成 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 点伤害。

iv_last_bastion.bbcode: 你底线行的所有友方随从 [color=#55c7b8][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+1/+1[/font][/color] 并获得[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]坚守[/font][/color]

iv_saint_warden.bbcode:
[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]嘲讽[/font][/color]、[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]持盾[/font][/color]、[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]福泽[/font][/color]
[font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf][u]圣光，福泽天下！[/u][/font]

neutral_coin.bbcode: 获得 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font] 点本回合可用的辉尘

nl_militia.bbcode:
[font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf][u]拿起草叉的农夫
冲在最前[/u][/font]

nl_recruit.bbcode:
[font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf][u]刚领到军靴
还没领到勇气[/u][/font]

nl_field_medic.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]战吼[/font][/color]：使一个随从[color=#87c878][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]恢复[/font][/color] [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 点生命

nl_volley.bbcode: 对一个位于你半场的随从造成 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 点伤害

nl_focused_barrage.bbcode: 选择一列:该列所有敌方随从受到 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font] 点伤害

nl_torchbearer.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]亡语[/font][/color]:对相邻敌方随从造成 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font] 点伤害

nl_sapper.bbcode: [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf][color=#e0b24a]战吼[/color][/font]：对一个随从造成 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 点伤害(以自身为锚点,射程2)

nl_field_dressing.bbcode: 一个随从[color=#87c878]恢复[/color] [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]3[/font] 点生命

nl_watch_commander.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]战吼[/font][/color]:一个友方随从获得[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]嘲讽[/font][/color]

nl_forced_march.bbcode: 一个友方随从本回合移动力 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+1[/font]、抽 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font] 张牌

nl_strategist.bbcode:
[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]战吼[/font][/color]:抽 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 张牌。
运筹于帷幄之中。

nl_stealth.bbcode: 一个友方随从获得[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]潜行[/font][/color](不能被敌方指令/战吼选中，攻击后现形)

nl_spell_ward.bbcode: 一个友方随从获得[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]法术护体[/font][/color](抵挡下一次敌方指令/战吼效果)

uv_repair_sapper.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]战吼[/font][/color]：一个随从[color=#87c878][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]恢复[/font][/color] [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 点生命

uv_line_engineer.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]装配[/font][/color]：一个友方随从获得[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]嘲讽[/font][/color]

uv_calibrate.bbcode: 一个友方[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]架设[/font][/color]随从本回合可移动一格

uv_deploy_sentries.bbcode: 在你的底线行召唤两座 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font]/[font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 哨戒炮([color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]射程[/font][/color] [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font]、[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]架设[/font][/color])

wp_flanker.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]疾行[/font][/color] [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font],[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]围猎[/font][/color](近战攻击时,每有一个友方与目标相邻,伤害 [color=#55c7b8][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+2[/font][/color],可叠加)

wp_raider.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]冲锋[/font][/color],[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]围猎[/font][/color](近战攻击时,每有一个友方与目标相邻,伤害 [color=#55c7b8][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+2[/font][/color],可叠加)

wp_howler.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]战吼[/font][/color]:相邻友方随从本回合移动力 [color=#55c7b8][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+1[/font][/color]

wp_rift_leaper.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]疾行[/font][/color] [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font]、[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]跃障[/font][/color](可跨过随从跳跃 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 格)

wp_packlord.bbcode:
[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]冲锋[/font][/color]、[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]践踏[/font][/color]、[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]围猎[/font][/color]
[font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf][u]大地为之震颤[/u][/font]

wp_hunt_signal.bbcode: 一个友方随从本回合移动力 [color=#55c7b8][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+2[/font][/color]

wp_pounce.bbcode: 一个友方随从获得[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]偷袭[/font][/color],直到回合结束

wp_pack_call.bbcode: 在你的底线行召唤两只掠群幼狼([font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font]/[font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font],[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]疾行[/font][/color][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font])

wp_trail_sniffer.bbcode: 移动后:本随从 [color=#55c7b8][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+1/+0[/font][/color](每回合最多 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 次)

wp_den_mother.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]战吼[/font][/color]:在你的底线行召唤一只 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font]/[font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 掠群幼狼

wp_blood_tracker.bbcode: 移动后:对相邻敌方随从造成 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font] 点伤害

wp_encircle.bbcode: 你的所有友方随从本回合移动力 [color=#55c7b8][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+1[/font][/color]

wp_wild_heart.bbcode: 一个友方随从 [color=#55c7b8][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+1/+1[/font][/color] 并获得[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]围猎[/font][/color]

wp_ghost_of_wilds.bbcode:
[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]疾行[/font][/color] [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]3[/font]
移动后:本随从 [color=#55c7b8][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+2/+0[/font][/color](每回合最多 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 次)。

wp_moon_huntress.bbcode:
[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]偷袭[/font][/color]、[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]疾行[/font][/color] [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font]
移动后:本随从 [color=#55c7b8][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+2/+0[/font][/color](每回合最多 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 次)。
月影之下,一击封喉。

uv_master_artificer.bbcode: [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf][color=#e0b24a]战吼[/color]:[/font] 在维尔达相邻的空格放置一座影子炮台(复制你炮台当前的面板、状态、与加装的模块）

uv_mod_autoloader.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]装配[/font][/color]：炮台每回合可攻击两次

uv_mod_blast_shell.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]装配[/font][/color]：[font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf][color=#e0b24a]溅射Ⅱ[/color][/font] 命中后,与目标相邻的所有敌方随从各受一半伤害(向上取整)。同系分级同装取最高。

uv_turret_core.bbcode:
射程 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font]
装配模块来升级它、至多 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font] 座

uv_field_rebuild.bbcode: 将历史池中当前未在装的模块随机 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 个装回你的炮台（空位不足则装到满）

uv_gun_crew.bbcode:
[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]亡语[/font][/color]：若你的炮台在场
使它 [color=#55c7b8][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+0/+2[/font][/color]

uv_mod_siphon_shell.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]装配[/font][/color]：[color=#87c878][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf][color=#e0b24a]吸血Ⅰ[/color][/font][/color] — 攻击造成伤害后, 炮台[color=#87c878][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]回复 1[/font][/color] 点生命

uv_mod_frag_shell.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]装配[/font][/color]：[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]溅射Ⅰ[/font][/color] — 远程命中后,与目标相邻的所有敌方随从各受 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]1[/font] 点伤害

uv_mod_split_shell.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]装配[/font][/color]：远程命中后,目标相邻的随机一个其他敌方随从受一半伤害(向上取整)

uv_mod_anchor_platform.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]装配[/font][/color]：[font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]+1/+3[/font]、[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]坚守[/font][/color]、但是炮台变得无法移动

uv_mod_siphon_core.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]装配[/font][/color]：[color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]吸血Ⅱ[/font][/color] — 攻击造成伤害后,炮台回复其一半(向下取整)。同系分级同装取最高。

uv_gear_foreman.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]战吼:[/font][/color]若你的炮台在场,你的炮台 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf][color=#55c7b8]+1/+1[/color][/font]

uv_mod_failsafe_pod.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]亡语[/font][/color](炮台被击毁时):随机保住其余在装模块中的 [font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]2[/font] 件,你的下一座炮台落成时自动装上;随后本保险舱作废

uv_mod_concussion.bbcode: [color=#e0b24a][font=res://assets/fonts/SourceHanSerifSC-Bold.otf]装配[/font][/color]：远程命中后,目标迟缓(下回合无法移动)
